task: I need a quick way to reply to a client who sent a vague note and wants a revised concept by end of day. Can you give me a couple of reply options — one very short and one a little more polished — so I can pick the cleanest one?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here are two options you can send:

**Very short:**
“Thanks — I’m on it and will send a revised concept by end of day.”

**A little more polished:**
“Thanks for the note — I’ll revise the concept and send an updated version by end of day.”

If you want, I can also give you:
- a **warmer/client-friendly** version
- a **more confident/direct** version
- or a version that **asks one clarifying question** without sounding slow

user_simulator.text:
Clean. The short one works. The polished one is fine too, but I’d probably send the first unless I want to sound a little warmer.

If you want the cleanest possible middle ground, maybe:
“Got it — I’ll revise the concept and send an updated version by end of day.”
